Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS up JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND (up."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) AND (up."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) AND (up."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.fuel_oil.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) AND (up."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL OR bs."out.propane.total.energy_consumption" IS NULL) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/47bbf944af33683d266323ce817649e43cab4fa1311d4dce2dba9feca93e1e18/3391d819-11cc-44e5-ab9d-0486cc474f9f/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
